taxonomy: Juncellus serotinus belongs to the family Juncaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as rush family. The genus Juncellus itself is a small group of plants that are closely related to the genus Juncus, also known as rushes. Juncellus serotinus is an annual or biennial plant native to Europe and Asia. Its classification can be further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, the division Magnoliophyta, and the class Liliopsida.
